PG Programme in
UI/UX & AI Product Design

India’s only AI-First Design Programme that prepares you for
leadership roles in user design and product.

Apply Now

Post Graduate Programme
in UI/UX & AI Product Design

Format

Hybrid

Online/Offline Classes

Commencement Date

July '26

Applications Open

Eligibility

Bachelor’s Degree

Or equivalent, in any discipline

Duration

16 Months

From learner to UX professional 

Round 2 Starting Soon Apply Now
  • Highlights
  • Curriculum & Faculty
  • Admissions & Fees
  • Career Prospects

Why AI Product Design, Why Now?

India’s digital economy is projected to reach 20% of GVA by 2029–30 making user experience a business priority now. As digital products scale, India lacks design leadership to drive research, simplify complexity, & shape product decisions, a gap also highlighted by Finance Minister, Nirmala Sitharaman, in the Union Budget 2026–27.

AI is changing how products are built, 93% of designers in India report using AI tools, leading to the need for job-ready talent that can do UI/UX, product thinking, & AI-first feature design. This programme builds those capabilities through hands-on tools, real product cases, & outcome-focused projects.

Choose Your Learning Path

Offline Weekday Programme

On-Campus, Gurugram - WeekDays
  • For fresh design graduates & early-career aspirants looking to build strong foundations
  • Full-time, on-campus learning in Gurugram with studios, labs, and mentor sessions every weekday
  • Collaborate in teams, participate in live design sprints, critiques, and portfolio reviews
  • Includes placement support & internship assistance for first-time job seekers

Online Weekend Programme

Weekend Live Classes + Flexible WeekDays
  • For working professionals balancing career and upskilling
  • Live weekend classes & self-paced weekday work designed to fit alongside a full-time job
  • Apply learning directly to your current role, while building projects that transition you into design
  • Includes career transition support and portfolio positioning for role shifts into product design

Build Products That
Users Love

This programme prepares you for leading industry roles by letting you
design, prototype, and ship modern digital products.

Become an AI Product Designer
Who Can Ship End to End

Develop end to end product design capability through hands-on
work across interface craft, AI native UX, and product workflows.

1

Build UI, interaction design, research, and prototyping skills

2

Create AI-assisted flows with prompts, AI tools, and testing plans

3

Learn design systems, handoffs, and iteration with real teams

Taught by Design Leaders at
Top Product Companies

Learn from senior designers and user experience leaders at
Swiggy, Cars24, BharatPe, Zepto, Uber, and more.

1

1:1 mentorship from product designers and UI/UX experts

2

Masterclasses by Chief Design Officers & global professors

3

70%+ courses taught by Industry practitioners

Download Dropshipping Report

Work on Live Product Cycles
With Real Teams

Instead of waiting till graduation, students enter real product environments during the programme.

1

Live Studios where you solve problems for real companies

2

Design Sprints for building with engineers and PMs

3

Ship work that has users, constraints and outcomes

Download Internship Report

Graduate With a Job
Not Just a Portfolio

Land top product jobs through hands-on training in interactive prototypes, AI-augmented workflows, and development-ready designs.

1

Highest placement of ₹1.2 Cr secured by our graduates

2

Avg CTC of ₹33 LPA in brands like Google, Zomato, Myntra, CRED

3

30 international offers across the UAE, USA, and Canada

Download Singapore GIP Report

Become an AI Product Designer
Who Can Ship End to End

Develop end to end product design capability through hands-on
work across interface craft, AI native UX, and product workflows.

1

2

3

Download Internship Report

Graduate With a Job
Not Just a Portfolio

Land top product jobs through hands-on training in interactive prototypes, AI-augmented workflows, and development-ready designs.

1

Highest placement of ₹1.2 Cr secured by our graduates

2

Avg CTC of ₹33 LPA in brands like Google, Zomato, Myntra, CRED

3

30 international offers across the UAE, USA, and Canada

Download Singapore GIP Report

What This
Programme Leads to

This is a career accelerator programme for aspiring Product Designer, AI-
First Product Builder, & Global Operator. Post the programme you would
have mastered interaction design and development of AI-native products preparing you for a truly global role in startups and product teams.

What This
Programme Leads to

This is a postgraduate programme for aspiring product designers, Al-first product builders, & global operators. Post the programme you would have mastered interaction design and development of Al-native products, preparing you for a truly global role in startups and product teams.

Learn by Doing
Not Just by Sitting in Lectures

Solve design challenges each term ranging from user research and interface design to prototyping and usability testing.

Study Abroad Programme

Study Abroad to-
Gain Global Exposure

Study abroad for summer school or short duration immersion at prestigious global B-Schools like Babson College, IESEG France, SDA Bocconi, Harvard etc and gain unmatched insights, while experiencing life in a new country.

Dark Pattern Audit

Identify Dark Patterns and Improve Retention & Long-Term User Value

Target 1Cr+ in revenue by building and scaling your own
e-commerce ventures.

  • Audit onboarding, pricing, and cancellation in Cred, Groww, and Netflix-style flows
  • Identify dark patterns such as forced continuity, hidden costs, and roach motels
  • Redesign decision screens with disclosure-first UX and an LTV lift hypothesis

Ghost Cart Revenue Recovery

Reassess Checkout Drop Offs and
Reduce Abandoned Cart Losses

Learn marketing by building your own influencer brand. Create channels that run into thousands and even millions of followers.

  • Audit abandoned cart journeys in Blinkit, Nykaa, and Myntra-style flows
  • Redesign checkout for address, payment, and
    error states
  • Propose an A/B testing plan targeting 15% or more recovery in lost revenue

AI Copilot SaaS Dashboard

Build an Internal AI Copilot for Faster
Decisions and Operator Productivity

Collaborate with your peers to bridge gaps, exchange ideas, and create outstanding prototypes, all in under 48 hours.

  • Map data-to-decision workflows in Razorpay, Zoho, and Freshworks-style dashboards
  • Prototype natural language search over metrics, tickets, and revenue views
  • Design alerts and next-best-action patterns targeting 20% productivity uplift

Founder–Designer Fellowship

Work on Product Decisions
With Real Time Pressure & Trade Offs

Get the chance to oversee investments across diverse
asset classes, including Crypto and Blockchain, Public and
Private Equities, Fund of Funds, REITs, InvITs, and exciting
startups.

  • Work on problems like onboarding drop-offs, pricing pages, and investor demo flows
  • Run fast discovery and MVP UX for Meesho, PhonePe, and Notion-style products
  • Deliver pitch-ready prototypes and handoffs used in reviews, demos, and launches

0 → 100K Users Challenge

Take a Product From Idea to MVP to Live Users, Iterating With Real Metrics

  • Identify user problems like campus navigation, expense tracking, creator scheduling
  • Design and launch an MVP with onboarding, core flow, and basic analytics
  • Track sign-ups, activation, retention, and iterate based on usage data

100+ Empaneled
Industry Experts

Learn from leading designers, UX leaders, and industry experts
from global companies and design-driven organisations.

Real Insights from
Our Faculty

Gain insights from industry leaders on how AI is shaping the future of product design!

Saptarshi Prakash, AVP of Design - Swiggy

How is AI accelerating product design workflows?

Ishaan Kothiyal, Head of Design - Cars24 Arabia

How is designing for India different than global markets?

Rewati Raman, Director of Design - ET Money

What is the impact of AI on Product Design?

  • Finance and Fintech
  • Large Tech
  • Consumer Tech
  • Emerging

  • Emerging

Potential  Job Roles

Our programme equips students with product thinking, UX research capability, and UI craft to work in modern product teams. You graduate with portfolio proof across discovery, interface design, prototyping, usability testing, and collaboration-ready handoffs.

Product Designer

Interaction Designer

Experience Designer

UX Researcher

Design Researcher

User Research Analyst

UX Strategist

Service Designer

UI Designer

Visual Designer

Design Systems Designer

Motion Designer

Product Design Manager

Product Strategist

Curriculum with
Unique In Class and Out Class Combination

  • Year 1

    Learn Fundamentals of Tech and Business

  • Year 2

    Excel in New-Age Skills

  • Year 3

    Transform into a Business Leader

  • Year 4

    Get Ready for the Real World

In Class | Core Courses

Foundational Courses

  • Art of Communication - Public Speaking & Elocution

  • Introduction to Microsoft PowerPoint & Excel

  • Legalities in Business - From Compliances to Loopholes

  • Fundamentals of Accounting - Understanding Financial Statements



  • Macroeconomics - How Economy Affects Business

  • Microeconomics - Understanding the Dynamics of Demand and Supply

    • Strategic Management

  • Problem Solving and Structuring - How Leaders Make Decisions 





    • Finance and Fintech

  • Managerial Accounting - Diagnosing Business Health

    • Product Management

  • Introduction to Product Management - How to Build an App





    • Digital Marketing & Brand Management

  • Building Marketing Strategies - Getting Customers to Buy the Product

    • Data Analytics

  • Principles of Statistics - Navigating Uncertainties in Business

  • Mastering Data Visualisation - Telling a Story with Data

    • Out Class

    Dropshipping Challenge

    Students target to get 1Cr+ in revenue by building their e-commerce ventures & selling on Amazon, BlinkIt & own websites.

    Download Dropshipping Report

    Global Immersion Programme

    Get the chance to travel and explore a new country and immerse yourself in its business, community, and socioeconomics.

    Download Japan GIP Report

    Shopfloor Internship

    Work on-ground with leading D2C brands to gain real-time consumer insights and solve business challenges firsthand.

    Download Internship Report

    In Class | Core + Elective Courses

    Foundational Courses

  • Managerial Behaviour - Understanding Human Psychology

  • Introduction to Operations - Building Systems from the Ground Up

  • Introduction to HRM - Managing People and Processes




    • Strategic Management

  • Corporate Strategies - Building Competitive Advantage

  • Corporate Governance -  How should Boards Work

    • Finance and Fintech

  • Corporate Finance - Maximising Shareholder Value

  • Venture Capital & FinTech - Decoding the Future of Finance


    • Product Management

  • Design Thinking and Prototyping - Building Customer-Centric Products

  • Product Analytics - Measuring Success with Metrics

    • Digital Marketing & Brand Management

  • Digital Marketing - How Instagram and YouTube Can Get You Customers

  • Understanding Consumer Behaviour-  Decoding Consumer Decision Making

    • Data Analytics

  • Introduction to Machine Learning -1 - Understanding Algorithms behind AI

    • Out Class

    Creator Challenge

    Transform your passion into profit by mastering the art of building and monetising personal brands as Creator-preneurs.

    Download Content Creator Challenge Report

    Local Consulting Challenge

    Tackle real-world business problems faced by local companies, develop innovative solutions, and gain hands-on consulting experience.

    Corporate Internships

    From EY to Zomato, work with top companies, apply classroom knowledge to practical challenges, and build a network that can jumpstart your professional journey.

    Download Internship Report

    In Class

    Foundational Courses

  • Intro to Blockchain, Metaverse & AI - Understanding New Age Technologies

  • Public Policy and Advocacy - How Businesses work with Government

    • Strategic Management

  • The Founder's Playbook - Strategic Scenarios & Real-World Application



  • Negotiation & Financial Acumen - Crafting Win-Win Solutions 

    • Finance and Fintech

  • Valuations & Financial Modelling - Finding a Company’s Worth

  • Markets, Portfolios & Prudence - The Investment Playbook






    • Product Management

  • Product Led Growth Strategies - Scaling 10X with Product

  • Product Strategy and Innovation - How Product Managers Innovate









    • Digital Marketing & Brand Management

  • Strategic Brand Management - How to Scale a Brand

  • Content Generation and Advertising - How Advertisers Influence Customers

    • Data Analytics

  • Big Data Analytics - Crunching Numbers to Find Patterns

  • Introduction to Machine Learning -2 - Applications in Business

    • Out Class

    Industry Treks

    Participate in industry-specific tours, and get the chance to interact with investors, founders, and executives of leading companies.

    Leadership Retreats

    Learn the art of leadership through a 7-10 day offsite retreat with uncertain and ever changing environments, and get trained in complex decision making.

    Entrepreneurship Capstone

    Experience a 0-to-1 journey from ideation to pitching real VCs, and get a grant to launch your own startups.

    Download Entrepreneurship Report

    Out Class

    Industry Training

    Spend a year working alongside CXOs from top companies like KPMG, Razorpay, and McKinsey, while receiving mentorship from industry experts in your field.

    Download Internship Report

    Startup Incubation

    Take your entrepreneurial ventures to the next level. Get the support, resources, and mentorship needed to scale your startup, and refine your business model.

    Download Entrepreneurship Report
    INNOVATIVE SPECIALIsATIONS

    An Immersive, Industry-Aligned Pedagogy
    for Product Designers

    Study core industry-focused modules
    to gain practical knowledge
    and skills
    for the digital age.

    Master Concepts
    Inside and Outside the Classroom

    Foundations of Digital & AI-Native Design

    Students learn core language of digital products and progressively integrate AI tools, collaborative systems, and code-assisted design practices.

    • In-class
    • Out-Class
    • Foundations of Digital Design

      How to apply composition, color, hierarchy, and layout to design clear, balanced digital interfaces?

    • Heuristic Evaluation and Usability

      How to examines an interface and compares it against a set of established design principles (heuristics)?

    • Visual Storytelling for Digital Products

      How to turn ideas into impactful visual stories through sketching and storytelling frameworks?

    • Wireframing & Interface Design

      How to create intuitive UI layouts and interactive wireframes using Figma and Framer?

    • Typography Systems & Responsive Scaling

      How to build scalable, responsive typography systems for digital products?

    • AI-Driven Design Exploration

      How to use generative AI to accelerate ideation and explore visual directions?

    • Designing with Cursor

      How to design and prototype by collaborating directly with code using Cursor?

    Dark Pattern Audit Challenge

    Increase Long-Term User Value (LTV) by 25% by replacing predatory dark patterns with transparent, trust-centered design systems.

    • Perform a "Dark Pattern Audit" on a high-growth app to identify deceptive UI elements like "roach motels" (easy in, hard out), hidden costs, and forced continuity.
    • Redesign the automated decision-making interfaces (like loan approvals or personalized pricing) to meet the mandatory disclosure requirements.
    • Run a simulated A/B test comparing the "Deceptive UI" against your "Trust-Centered UI” to show increase in Long-Term User Value.

    Master Research, Prototyping & Industry Practice

    Deepening students’ understanding of user centered design, information structure, and real-world product building with emphasis on interfaces and contemporary design practice.

    • In-Class
    • Out-Class
    • Research Methods I

      How to conduct field studies, user interviews, and synthesize insights through personas and journey maps?

    • Information Architecture

      How to design clear, scalable information structures using AI-assisted card sorting and clustering techniques?

    • Web Technologies for Designers

      How to apply core web technologies—HTML, CSS, and JavaScript—to design and prototype for the web?

    • Interface Prototyping

      How to build high-fidelity interface prototypes using Figma, AI plugins, and Cursor for component-level coding?

    • Concept-to-Prototype

      How to take a product idea from concept to working prototype through a sprint supported by AI co-pilots?

    • Collaborative Design with MCP Servers

      How to collaborate in real time using shared design and code workspaces?

    • Design System

      How to define foundational design principles, tokens, and components that ensure consistency across a product?

    Ghost Cart Revenue Recovery Challenge

    Drive 15%+ increase in annual gross revenue for the client by recovering lost sales.

    • Audit and redesign an e-commerce checkout flow to maximize conversions and recover lost revenue from abandoned carts.
    • Design and prototype a streamlined, trust-optimized multi-step checkout experience, focusing on reducing form fields, improving error messaging, and implementing a transparent value proposition.
    • Pitch the proposed solution to the client stakeholders and develop a precise A/B testing implementation plan with a developer handoff, forecasting the ROI within a 3-month deployment window.

    Design Thinking, Interaction & Intelligent Systems

    Focus on advanced design thinking, critical analysis, & intelligent interaction design to synthesise complex research insights into clear design ideas, & design adaptive, AI-powered interactions.

    • In-Class
    • Out-Class
    • Critical Thinking for Designers

      How to use visual storytelling and sketching to explore, question, and refine digital concepts?

    • Product and Project Management

      How to manage life cycle of a product, right through from the business goal/perspective to product delivery?

    • Research Methods II

      How to synthesize and cluster insights from large qualitative datasets to inform strategic design decisions?

    • Cursor for Research Writing

      How to draft, edit, and refine research using AI-assisted writing and collaboration workflows?

    • Interaction Design & Motion

      How to design motion, responsiveness, and adaptive UI behaviors enhanced by AI-driven interaction systems?

    • Conversational Interfaces & Adaptive Systems

      How to design and integrate chatbots and adaptive systems into digital products for intelligent user experiences?

    • Advanced Design System

      How to design governance, contribution, and versioning models for system-wide adoption?

    The "AI-Copilot" SaaS Dashboard

    Improve an organisation’s employee productivity by 20%+ by reducing "time-to-insight" to under 60 seconds.

    • Map the current "data-to-decision" workflow for the target employees to establish a baseline for productivity and pain points in data synthesis.
    • Prototype a natural language search interface and predictive insight components (the "copilot") that automatically highlight critical data anomalies and suggest the next best action.
    • Simulate the new workflow during testing to measure the reduction in time required to complete core tasks, directly quantifying the efficiency gain per employee.

    Advanced Interaction, Systems & Psychology

    The term emphasizes computational interaction, systems thinking, and responsible use of intelligent interfaces—bridging design, technology, and human experience.

    • In-class
    • OUT-class
    • Indirect Tax Laws How to ensure efficiency in indirect taxation systems?
    • Integrated Business Solutions How to tie strategy, finance, tax, and ethics together?
    • Direct Tax Laws & International Taxation How to manage corporate & cross-border taxation?
    • Design Communication & Collaboration

      How to communicate design ideas clearly through writing and discussion, collaborate effectively in multidisciplinary teams, and apply core HCI principles through research and industry-led perspectives?

    • Programming Interactive Experiences (PIX)

      How to design, implement, and evaluate interactive digital experiences—such as web apps, installations, and kiosks?

    • Design for Inclusive Experiences

      How to to systematically understand the variety of needs that a wide range of users might have, including older adults and people with disabilities?

    • Software Structures for User Interfaces (SSUI)

      How to design and build front-end interfaces across web, mobile, wearables, and desktop platforms using modern UI architectures, libraries, and design patterns?

    • Psychology of Play

      How to apply psychological theories of perception, motivation, emotion, and learning to design engaging, playful, and behavior-driven interactive experiences?

    • Conversational Interfaces & Adaptive Systems

      How to design and integrate chatbots and adaptive systems that respond intelligently to user needs and context?

    Founder’s Right Hand Challenge design Where Decisions Cost Real Money


    • Work Directly With Unicorn Startup Founders & CDO’s.
    • Work on live problems - Early-stage product discovery, MVP UX, Investor demos
    • Deliver design work used in real pitches & launches.

    The Capstone Project

    Apply the full spectrum of skills to a real-world product challenge. Structured around the complete product development lifecycle, it emphasises research-led, outcome-driven design practice.

    • In-class
    • OUT-class

    The Capstone Project is an intensive, one-semester experience designed to simulate the complete product development lifecycle.

    The project begins with understanding the industry sponsor and their business context, followed by defining the project scope and conducting research, including competitive analysis and user research. Students synthesize their findings into a structured set of insights, supported by documented reports, field notes, photographs, videos, models, and design frameworks.

    In the second half of the semester, teams move into ideation and prototyping, translating research insights into design concepts and interactive prototypes. The project emphasizes iterative design and testing, with prototypes evolving through multiple refinement cycles. The capstone concludes with a final presentation of a designed, developed, and tested prototype to faculty and industry stakeholders.

    0 → 100K Users Challenge


    • Take a product from idea to MVP to live users, iterating with real metrics
    • Identify user problems like campus navigation, expense tracking, creator scheduling
    • Design and launch an MVP with onboarding, core flow, and basic analytics
    • Track sign-ups, activation, retention, and iterate based on usage data

    Immerse Yourself in the Global Design Culture

    Experience how world-class digital products are researched, designed, and scaled
    through Global Immersion Programmes across leading design and technology hubs.

    Where You’ll Go

    Europe

    Learn enterprise UX and design systems at Philips and Mercedes-Benz, observe brand and service experience at the Louvre and Disneyland Paris, study consistency at scale through Porsche.

    Singapore

    Learn platform UX and high-frequency journeys at Agoda, study service design at Singtel, understand regulated UX at Sanofi and IHH Healthcare, observe experience orchestration at Universal Studios.

    Japan

    Study precision and human-centered design at Daikin & Nissan, learn systems thinking & large-scale journeys at Rakuten, observe UX design across culture and infra at Sensoji & Osaka.

    Dubai

    Engage with organisations like Careem, noon, and Emirates NBD to study platform UX, fintech flows, trust design, growth loops, and localisation across the Middle East.

    Real Insights from
    Our Faculty

    Gain insights from industry leaders on how AI is shaping the future of product design!

    What is the impact of AI on Product Design?

    Future Recruiters

    Take courses with Chief Design Officers, startup founders, and academicians from renowned global design institutes.

    Master user research, usability, and product design fundamentals under the guidance of highly rated Professors-in-Residence.

    Get 1-1 mentorship from Product Designers and UI/UX Experts.

    Enrollment Checklist
    Admissions Criteria

    1.

    Academics & Work
    Experience

    01.
    Academics

    Class X & XII Marks (Expected/Final) from one of the recognised boards including CBSE, ISC, IB, IGCSE etc. Both students with and without Mathematics in Class XII are eligible for the programme.

    2.

    Design Portfolio

    02.
    Aptitude Score

    Scores in Masters' Union Scholarship (Aptitude) Test/SAT/ACT.

    3.

    Communication Skills

    03.
    Extra Curricular Activities

    Applications would be evaluated for extracurricular achievements and projects.

    Enrollment Checklist
    Admissions Criteria

    01.
    Academic Background

    01.
    Academic Background

    We welcome candidates from diverse educational backgrounds. Whether you’ve completed formal education or have gained knowledge through experience, we value a strong passion for learning and personal growth.

    02.
    Design Portfolio

    02.
    Design Portfolio

    While financial knowledge is helpful, it’s not a requirement. If you have a curiosity about finance and are eager to build your skills, the CMT Programme is here to help you grow and develop in this area.

    03.
    Communication Skills

    03.
    Communication Skills

    We look for individuals who can approach problems with clarity, curiosity, and sound judgement. If you enjoy analysing challenges and making thoughtful decisions, you’ll thrive in the CMT Programme.

    Application Timeline & Process
    PGP in Product Design

    Rounds Application Fees Status Action
    Round 1 Fee 500/- Active Apply Now Apply Now
    Round 1 15th Oct ’25 -
    5th Dec ‘25    		 Nov/Dec ‘25 Dec/Jan ‘25 14th
    Jan '26     		INR 2,400/- Apply Now
    Round 2 Dec '24 - 28th Feb '25 Mar/Apr/May '25 Mar/Apr/May '25 INR 3,000/- Closed Aug '25 Apply Now
    Round 3 15th Mar '25 - 14th May '25 Mar/Apr/May '25 Mar/Apr/May '25 INR 3,500/- Closed Aug '25 Apply Now
    Round 4 18th May '25 - 16th Jul '25 Jun/Jul '25 Jun/Jul '25 INR 4,000/- Closed Aug '25 Apply Now

    01.

    Complete the
    Application Form

    01.

    Complete the
    Application Form

    Requirements

    Essential Documents

    • Latest resume in a clear, concise format

    • Government ID for verification

    • Qualification documents supporting your academics

    • Work experience documents, if applicable, such as offer letters, internship certificates, or experience letters

    • Any additional certificates that support your application, if applicable

    Video Essay

    • Once you submit part 1 of the application and pay the application fees, you will have to submit your video within 7 days. Please note your video should be uploaded to Google drive and uploaded in part 2 of your application form. Kindly ensure that the video on Google drive is set to "Anyone with the link can view".

    • Video length: Please create a video that is no longer than two minutes in duration.

    • Hobbies: It would be helpful if applicants could pick interesting, unique points that will make them memorable for the admissions committee..

    • Reference Video: For tips on creating an engaging and impactful video essay, refer to this helpful guide here.

    Priority Admissions Track:

    • If you're studying abroad or have an offer from a top global university, you can fast-track your admission through our Priority Admissions Track. Skip the entrance test and group discussion rounds, and go directly to the interview stage. Simply submit your admit letter and SAT scores as part of your application to qualify for this expedited process.

    02.

    Submit Your
    Portfolio

    02.

    Submit Your Portfolio and Video Essay

    Requirements

    What We Evaluate

    After submitting the application form and payment of the application fee, you will submit your portfolio to share deeper evidence of your creative thinking.

    Portfolio Submission

    • Upload your design portfolio or share a portfolio link

    • Your portfolio can include UI/UX projects, visual design work, product case studies, research work, or exploratory concepts

    • We value clarity of thinking, process, and intent over polish alone

    Video essay

    • Record and submit a short video introducing yourself and your design journey

    • Share what you are genuinely passionate about in design and product building, why you want to pursue UI UX and product design now, why you should be selected for this programme, and how the programme aligns with your goals over the next 2 to 3 years.

    • Keep it simple and clear. No editing or production polish required

    03.

    Personal
    Interview

    03.

    Personal Interview

    Requirements

    About the Interview

    This is a portfolio-led conversation with faculty members and senior industry practitioners. You will walk us through one or two projects from your portfolio, explaining the problem, your process, key design decisions, and trade-offs.


    The panel may ask how you approached research, how you prioritised flows, how you handled constraints like time, stakeholders, or incomplete information, and how you would collaborate with engineers and product managers in a real team. Expect a discussion that tests clarity of thinking, communication, and design judgment, not just visual polish.


    Interview details including date, venue, and time are shared 3 to 5 days in advance.

    • The in-person business simulation will require candidates to role-play as a CXO of a company and solve its business challenges in a team of 5-6 applicants. The interview will be a 1-1 conversation with our faculty or senior leadership.

    • The in-person business simulation and interview will be conducted on the same day for a student. These will be scheduled across major cities in India, and over Zoom in exceptional cases.

    04.

    Final Admission
    Decision

    04.

    Final Admission Decision

    Requirements

    Status of Evaluation

    Final decisions are shared by the admissions committee along with the fee structure for the upcoming programme. Applicants will fall into three categories:Final decisions are shared by the admissions committee along with the fee structure for the upcoming programme. Applicants will fall into three categories:

    Accepted

    • Applicants who have been offered admission will receive their decision along with the financial structure and the timeline to confirm their seat through payment of the admission fee.

    Waitlisted

    • Masters’ Union does not maintain a ranked waitlist. Applicants placed in this category will have their admission dependent on seats opening in the cohort. The admissions committee reviews the waitlist regularly and updates decisions as seats open.

    Rejected

    • Applicants who are not offered admission are welcome to reapply with a stronger profile in a later round, if applicable, or in the next academic year.

    Fee Structure

    Non-Refundable Fee Timelines
    		 Non-Refundable
    Admissions Fee     		16 Months
    Tuition Fees     		Tuition Fees
    20% Scholarship     		Tuition Fees
    30% Scholarship     		Tuition Fees
    50% Scholarship
    Before 31st May, 2026 INR 75,000/- - - - -
    Programme Commencement
    (Before start of classes)     		- INR 10,95,000/- INR 8,76,000/- INR 7,66,500/- INR 5,47,500/-
    Mid-Programme Installment
    (After 3 months)     		- INR 10,95,000/- INR 8,76,000/- INR 7,66,500/- INR 5,47,500/-
    Total INR 75,000/- INR 21,90,000/- INR 17,52,000/- INR 15,33,000/- INR 10,95,000/-

    *$78,000 converted to INR based on the 1:90 exchange rate. Actual amount will be dependent on the prevailing exchange rate at the time of study.


    Scholarships

    Based on your academic record, professional experience, and personal circumstances, you may be eligible for merit-based or need-based scholarships.

    Merit-Based Scholarships

    Scholarships awarded to learners who demonstrate exceptional design potential, strong portfolio, and creativity.

    Need-Based Scholarships

    Support for candidates facing financial constraints, ensuring talent is never limited by affordability.

    Parents' Perspective-
    The Masters’ Union Transformation

    Witnessing their child evolve into a confident, ambitious, and industry-ready professional is every parent’s dream. At Masters’ Union, our hands-on, immersive approach ensures that students not only excel academically but also develop real-world skills, leadership qualities, and an entrepreneurial mindset. Hear from parents who have seen this transformation first-hand.

    Explore Programme

    Frequently Asked
    Questions

    • General
    • Eligibility
    • Application Queries
    • Entrance: Portfolio submission & Interview
    • Admission Policies
    • Immersions

    What is the focus of the PGP in UI/UX and Product Design at Master’s Union?

    The PGP in Product Design & UI/UX focuses on building end-to-end design capability, covering user research, problem framing, UX strategy, interaction design, visual design, and design systems. The programme emphasises real-world problem solving, design thinking, and collaboration with product and engineering, preparing students to design meaningful, scalable digital experiences.

    Who should apply to this programme?

    This programme is for anyone looking to start or transition into a career in UI/UX and Product Design. It is suitable for fresh graduates, early-career professionals, and career switchers who aspire to work as Product Designers, UI/UX Designers, UX Researchers, Strategists, or in emerging roles such as Conversational UX, AR/VR Design, Accessibility Design, and Prompt Design for product interfaces.

    What skills will I gain by the end of the programme?

    Graduates develop strong capabilities in user research, UX design, UI design, prototyping, usability testing, design systems, and stakeholder communication. In addition, the program builds critical thinking, design leadership, and collaboration skills required to work effectively in fast-paced product teams.

    What career opportunities are available after completing this programme?

    After completing the programme, students can pursue roles such as Product Designer, UI/UX Designer, Interaction Designer, UX Researcher, or Design Consultant. Graduates are well-positioned to work with startups, tech companies, enterprises, design agencies, or even build and scale their own products.

    Does the programme offer industry exposure or hands-on experience?

    Yes. The programme is built to take you from Designer to a Product Builder and a Global Operator through a multi-track, studio-led curriculum that mirrors how real product organizations work. Students design, prototype, and iterate inside simulated product teams, working on real-world problems under the guidance of top design leaders. You graduate with proof, not promises–a portfolio that shows clear evidence of your thinking, building, and shipping.

    How is this programme different from traditional design courses?

    Unlike traditional design courses that focus mainly on tools or aesthetics, this programme takes a product-first approach. It combines design craft with business context, user empathy, and product strategy, ensuring graduates understand not just how to design, but why design decisions matter in building successful products.

    If an applicant doesn’t have an undergraduate degree, can they still apply?

    Yes. An undergraduate degree is not mandatory for admission to the PGP in Product Design & UI/UX. While many participants may hold undergraduate or advanced degrees, we also welcome applicants with strong professional experience, a proven track record of learning, and clear motivation to build a career in design. Applicants completing their undergraduate degree by May of the following year are also eligible to apply.

    Is there an age limit for admission?

    There is no strict age limit for the programme. Eligibility is evaluated holistically based on your experience, intent, and readiness for the programme. Applicants with more than 10 years of work experience are encouraged to connect with the admissions team at pgadmissions@mastersunion.org for personalised guidance on programme fit.

    Will not having a design background affect my chances of admission?

    Yes. A prior design background is preferred but actively encourages applications from diverse academic and professional backgrounds, including engineering, business, marketing, psychology, arts, and more.

    What kind of candidates is the programme looking for?

    We are looking for individuals who are curious, self-driven, and eager to build. Strong candidates show openness to feedback, comfort with ambiguity, empathy for users, and the ability to learn by doing. Leadership potential, initiative, and a growth mindset are key indicators of success in the programme.

    Is there a minimum GPA requirement?

    TNo, there is no minimum GPA requirement. Since grading systems vary globally, admissions decisions are not based solely on GPA. We consider your academic journey holistically, looking at coursework, learning outcomes, and overall performance, alongside professional experience and motivation.

    Can applicants get a call back from Masters’ Union?

    Given the volume of requests, we’d encourage students to reach out to the admissions team via email at pgadmissions@mastersunion.org. If students would still like to connect with us on call, reach out to our counselling team at 8929361765.

    Can applicants defer their admission offer from Masters’ Union to the next year?

    Currently, we are not offering the option to defer admission. Those who cannot join the programme in the current year are advised to apply again next year.

    Are all applicants interviewed?

    Only candidates who have been shortlisted post their application submission will be invited for the personal interview.

    Are any of the rounds more or less competitive than others?

    Each round is equally competitive, with the same acceptance ratio across all rounds. The most important factor is to dedicate sufficient time and effort into your application to accurately showcase your strengths and talents. However, applying in Round 1 offers several advantages:

    • Scholarships: If scholarships are a priority, we encourage applying in Round 1.

    • Hostel Room Choice: Round 1 students get priority in selecting their hostel rooms, ensuring they can choose from the best available options. data and present their findings.

    • Notice Period: They have ample time to serve notice periods at their current jobs.

    • Break Before Studies: They can take a well-deserved break before starting 16 months of intensive study.

    • Loan and Funding: They have more time to apply for loans and arrange funds.

    Can applicants get their profile evaluated?

    Feel free to connect with the admissions team to understand your fitment with the programme. While applicants are welcome to send their CV to pgadmissions@mastersunion.org for a preliminary conversation, due to a large volume of requests, our responses might be delayed.

    Can I submit non-design or cross-disciplinary work?

    No, we need a design and product portfolio that shows user-centric thinking, problem solving, or are equally valid.

    What kind of work should be included in the portfolio?

    Your portfolio should highlight how you think, not just what you designed. This can include user research, problem framing, wireframes, UI explorations, prototypes, experiments, or shipped work. We value clarity of thought, decision-making, and iteration more than polish alone.

    What format should the portfolio or submission be in?

    You can submit your work as a website, PDF, Notion page, Figma link, or Google Drive folder. The format matters less than how clearly your ideas, process, and outcomes are communicated.

    What if I don’t have any prior design experience?

    That’s okay. You can submit a problem exploration, redesign concept, research exercise, or product idea instead. We’re assessing your potential to grow into a product designer, not just past credentials.

    How is the portfolio evaluated during admissions?

    Portfolios are reviewed for clarity of thinking, problem understanding, user empathy, experimentation, and learning mindset. We’re less focused on tools or aesthetics and more on your ability to reason, build, and improve

    Will I build a portfolio during the programme?

    YYes. The program is designed to help you graduate with proof – a portfolio that demonstrates real product thinking, collaboration, and shipped outcomes aligned with industry expectations.

    Application Submission Policy

    If the applicant misses all the three rounds of a particular intake, the application form and its entire content will expire. At this point, the applicant will be required to complete a new application from scratch, for the next intake. An application will only be evaluated once it is complete. If it is completed after the deadline, it will be reviewed for the next round or (in the case of last round applicants) the following intake.

    Hostel Policy

    Masters’ Union offers opt-in accommodation to students admitted to the PGP. We offer a variety of options, each close to our campus and equipped with amenities to ensure a comfortable living experience. The fees for the course, as mentioned on the website, do not include hostel fees. The full fee structure, including that of the hostel, is sent to all our admitted students along with their offer letter.

    Feedback Policy

    Due to the large number of applications we receive for each intake, and the confidentiality of the deliberations of the admissions committee, we would be unable to provide detailed individual feedback on unsuccessful applications.

    Refund Policy

    Fees once submitted cannot be refunded. Masters’ Union reserves the right to amend this Refund Policy at any time without prior notice.

    Is participation in immersions mandatory or optional?

    Participation in any immersion is optional and depends on the student’s interest. Since our immersions are theme-based, students can choose the one that best aligns with their career goals and learning preferences.

    Is the immersion fee included in the tuition fee?

    The immersion fee is not included in the tuition fee. It is a separate, optional cost applicable only to students who choose to participate in the Global or Bharat Immersion programmes. 1 day off campus immersions are part of your programme with no added fee.

    Are there scholarships or financial aid options available?

    Yes - we offer scholarships on a first-come, first-served basis for select immersions.

    Will there be any certification or academic recognition after completion?

    Yes,students receive an official certificate from the Masters’ Union upon successful completion of the program.

    What kind of networking opportunities are available during the immersion?

    The immersions are designed to provide students with ample networking opportunities with faculty and peers as well as with industry professionals and leaders during company visits and interactions.

    Are there any financing options?

    Yes, there are financial institutions that can provide loans for up to 95% of the programme fees to the admitted students. Read here for further details.

    Is the admissions process different for the 3+1 Dual Degree UG Programme with Illinois Institute of Technology?

    No, the admissions process for the 3+1 Dual Degree UG Programme is the same as the standard process. Applicants must apply through the regular admissions portal, and eligibility for the programme is assessed based on their academic performance, extracurricular activities, and an interview.

    Will students have the option to choose the duration of transfer?

    Currently, the programme is designed as a one-year transfer option. Students will spend their fourth year at Illinois Institute of Technology, completing the final year of their undergraduate degree as part of the 3+1 Dual Degree UG Programme.

    When can the student decide if they want to opt for the 3+1 Dual Degree UG Programme with Illinois Institute of Technology?

    Students are strongly encouraged to decide on opting for the 3+1 Dual Degree UG Programme before starting their undergraduate journey at Masters’ Union. Early confirmation ensures guaranteed seat allocation and allows for streamlined academic planning tailored to the programme's requirements.

    While students may still choose to opt for the programme during their third year, this is subject to seat availability, which will be communicated at that time. Confirming at the beginning ensures a smooth transition and optimal preparation for their transfer to Illinois Tech.

    Will the curriculum at Illinois Tech align with what students study at Masters’ Union?

    Yes, the curriculum has been designed to ensure a seamless transfer between the institutions. Students will continue to build on the foundational and advanced topics they study at Masters’ Union.

    Can students secure internships in the US while at Illinois Tech?

    Yes, students will have access to Illinois Tech’s career services, which include internship placements, job fairs, and networking events with global employers.

    What will I graduate with at the end of the programme?

    Upon completing the programme, you will be awarded a Professional Certificate for Undergraduate Programme in Tech & Business Management by Masters' Union. Additionally, you will have the option to enrol in IIM Bangalore to pursue a BBA in Digital Business and Entrepreneurship, provided you clear all the exams and the eligibility criteria as set by the IIM Bangalore.

    What is the difference between the Masters' Union certification and the IIM Bangalore degree?

    The Masters' Union certification focuses on an industry-integrated, tech-driven curriculum designed for business management professionals. The IIM Bangalore (BBA) degree is a traditional academic qualification offered with standard coursework and university examinations.

    What makes the Masters’ Union Programme a better choice than earning the same degree from IIM Bangalore?

    While the IIM Bangalore degree provides a strong academic foundation,Masters' Union offers real-world exposure from day one. Through outclasses and internships starting in Year 1, students gain hands-on experience with industry leaders from top companies like Microsoft, Google, and Zomato. This early exposure, combined with rigorous academic training, ensures that our students are not only academically strong but also industry-ready, with the highest CTC touching ₹61.5 LPA and an average CTC of ₹28.5 LPA, securing top-tier job offers even before graduation.

    Is this an online degree, is it authentic?

    Yes, the degree is awarded through IIM Bangalore’s online platform, making it an online degree. However, it holds the same recognition and value as any full-time IIM Bangalore degree.

    How well is this degree recognised for higher studies abroad?

    The degree awarded by IIM Bangalore is highly respected and recognised for higher studies abroad. With IIM Bangalore’s global reputation and the rigor of its curriculum, the degree holds significant international credibility, opening doors to top global universities and MBA programs for further education.

    Can I still pursue the Masters' Union certification if I don’t enrol in the IIM Bangalore degree?

    Yes, you can still complete the Masters' Union Undergraduate Programme in Tech and Business Management and earn the certification even if you choose not to enrol in the IIM Bangalore degree.
